checks.describe: ChromaDB heartbeat responds if the m7 lab is currently up (else SKIP-OK)
the tracked crew.py is never modified by the deep-dive experiment (patches only ever touch copies)
deep-dive-only images (hot-triage, no-gate) are cleaned up, or were never built (SKIP-OK)
checks.run: PATH="$HOME/.rd/bin:$PATH" docker images -q acme-incident-crew:hot-triage acme-incident-crew:no-gate 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '

checks.describe: knob-variant run transcripts produced by the experiment (or not yet run)
deep-dive page carries the live knob-variant comparison table
deep-dive page shows the APPROVED outcome marker from the folded experiment transcripts
deep-dive page documents the crew's actual per-agent temperature values
deep-dive page has no hardcoded author-machine absolute path (must be portable via $REPO_ROOT / relative paths)
deep-dive page's Variant B section documents that the OUTCOME marker is NOT pinned once the gate is removed (the gate, not temperature, is the determinism)
checks.run: grep -c 'gate.*is the finding\|is the finding' site/docs/m7-multi-agent/deep-dive.md
